name: Strikeforce Mining & Resources Ltd.
description: Strikeforce Mining & Resources Ltd. (SMR) is a mining and resource company primarily known for its involvement in the production of ferromolybdenum. Historically associated with the Basic Element group, the company has operated as a holding entity for various mining assets. Incorporated in Cyprus in 2002, SMR has been involved in international investment and resource development activities. While it has been linked to potential listings on international stock exchanges in the past, it functions as a private limited company focused on the management and strategic oversight of its industrial and mineral resource portfolio.
